zh-CN.headlineFact: 世界杯小国继续创造历史，霍尔木兹海峡再度紧张，欧洲热浪与委内瑞拉地震同时考验治理能力
zh-CN.headlineView: 世界不是缺少新闻，而是缺少真正看懂新闻的耐心
zh-CN.headlineFull: 世界杯小国继续创造历史，霍尔木兹海峡再度紧张，欧洲热浪与委内瑞拉地震同时考验治理能力; 世界不是缺少新闻，而是缺少真正看懂新闻的耐心.
zh-CN.intro: 过去一天，世界杯小组赛继续收官：西班牙1:0击败乌拉圭并头名出线，佛得角以三连平晋级32强，比利时5:1大胜新西兰，埃及1:1战平伊朗后晋级。球场之外，霍尔木兹海峡再度出现船只遇袭和美伊互相打击，委内瑞拉地震死亡人数升至1430人，欧洲多国刷新高温纪录，乌克兰继续打击俄罗斯军工与能源设施，塞尔维亚总统武契奇宣布将辞职并提前选举，澳大利亚加码儿童社交媒体禁令，SpaceX即将被纳入纳斯达克100指数。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 真正值得关注的，不只是今天发生了什么，而是世界同时把哪些系统推到压力边缘。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 今天从球场到海峡，从灾害救援到资本市场，关键词都是压力测试。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: 今日关键词：小国晋级、航道风险、灾害救援、极端高温、远程战争、提前选举、儿童网络保护、资本市场重排。

en-US.headlineFact: World Cup underdogs kept making history, Hormuz tightened again, and heat plus earthquake response tested governance
en-US.headlineView: the world does not lack news, it lacks patience to understand what the news means
en-US.headlineFull: World Cup underdogs kept making history, Hormuz tightened again, and heat plus earthquake response tested governance; the world does not lack news, it lacks patience to understand what the news means.
en-US.intro: Over the past day, the World Cup group stage kept closing: Spain beat Uruguay 1-0 and topped the group, Cape Verde advanced after three draws, Belgium beat New Zealand 5-1, and Egypt moved on after a 1-1 draw with Iran. Beyond the pitch, the Strait of Hormuz saw fresh attacks and retaliation, Venezuela's earthquake toll rose to 1,430, Europe kept breaking heat records, Ukraine struck Russian military and energy infrastructure, Serbia's President Aleksandar Vucic said he would resign and call an early election, Australia raised penalties for child social-media violations, and SpaceX was set to join the Nasdaq-100.
en-US.xiaziQuote: The point is not only the event list, but which systems are being pushed toward the edge at the same time.
en-US.doudouQuote: From stadiums to straits, from rescue work to markets, today's shared word is stress test.
en-US.footerTakeaway: Keywords: underdog qualification, shipping risk, disaster rescue, heat, long-range war, early elections, child online safety, and market reshuffling.

zh-CN.headlineFact: 西班牙头名晋级，佛得角三连平出线
zh-CN.headlineView: 世界杯真正动人的地方，是强队兑现实力，也是小国第一次被全世界记住
zh-CN.headlineFull: 西班牙头名晋级，佛得角三连平出线; 世界杯真正动人的地方，是强队兑现实力，也是小国第一次被全世界记住.
zh-CN.intro: 北京时间6月27日05:00至6月28日05:00，世界杯共结束4场比赛：乌拉圭0:1西班牙、佛得角0:0沙特阿拉伯、新西兰1:5比利时、埃及1:1伊朗。西班牙凭借巴埃纳的进球击败乌拉圭并进入淘汰赛；佛得角三连平出线，将在32强面对阿根廷；比利时大胜新西兰，埃及则在与伊朗的平局后晋级。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 强队赢球是秩序，小国晋级是世界杯最珍贵的意外。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 三连平还能出线，佛得角这剧本比很多励志片都硬。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: 24小时关键词：西班牙头名、佛得角出线、比利时大胜、埃及晋级。

en-US.headlineFact: Spain advanced as group winner, while Cape Verde reached the knockouts after three draws
en-US.headlineView: the World Cup matters because favorites can confirm power and small nations can enter global memory
en-US.headlineFull: Spain advanced as group winner, while Cape Verde reached the knockouts after three draws; the World Cup matters because favorites can confirm power and small nations can enter global memory.
en-US.intro: From 05:00 June 27 to 05:00 June 28 Beijing time, four World Cup matches finished: Uruguay 0-1 Spain, Cape Verde 0-0 Saudi Arabia, New Zealand 1-5 Belgium, and Egypt 1-1 Iran. Spain beat Uruguay through a Baena goal and moved into the knockouts. Cape Verde advanced after three draws and earned a last-32 date with Argentina. Belgium routed New Zealand, while Egypt progressed after holding Iran.
en-US.xiaziQuote: Favorites winning is order. A small nation advancing is the World Cup's best surprise.
en-US.doudouQuote: Three draws and still through. Cape Verde wrote a better script than most sports films.
en-US.footerTakeaway: Keywords: Spain top, Cape Verde through, Belgium rout, Egypt advance.

sources.title: Baena strike sends Spain past Uruguay into World Cup knockouts
Jubilant Cape Verde set date with Argentina in World Cup round of 32

zh-CN.headlineFact: 伊朗无人机袭击巴林并有船只在海峡遇袭
zh-CN.headlineView: 霍尔木兹海峡每一次紧张，都会把地区冲突变成全球账单
zh-CN.headlineFull: 伊朗无人机袭击巴林并有船只在海峡遇袭; 霍尔木兹海峡每一次紧张，都会把地区冲突变成全球账单.
zh-CN.intro: 在美国空袭伊朗目标后，伊朗无人机袭击巴林，一艘船只也在海峡附近遭到打击。巴林是美国第五舰队所在地，霍尔木兹海峡又是全球能源运输关键通道，因此局势升级不只是中东安全问题，也会传导到油价、保险、航运和各国通胀预期。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 和平从来不只是在谈判桌上，也在航道、保险单和每一艘商船的通行风险里。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 油轮一紧张，全世界的油价表情都跟着紧张。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: 关键词：霍尔木兹、巴林、无人机、能源航道、油价风险。

en-US.headlineFact: Iranian drones attacked Bahrain and a ship was struck near the strait
en-US.headlineView: every flare-up in Hormuz turns a regional fight into a global bill
en-US.headlineFull: Iranian drones attacked Bahrain and a ship was struck near the strait; every flare-up in Hormuz turns a regional fight into a global bill.
en-US.intro: After U.S. strikes on Iranian targets, Iranian drones attacked Bahrain and a ship was hit near the strait. Bahrain hosts the U.S. Fifth Fleet, while the Strait of Hormuz remains a core artery for global energy flows. Escalation there is not only a Middle East security story; it moves through oil prices, insurance, shipping, and inflation expectations.
en-US.xiaziQuote: Peace is not only negotiated at tables. It is tested in shipping lanes, insurance contracts, and every commercial vessel's risk premium.
en-US.doudouQuote: When tankers get nervous, oil prices get nervous too.
en-US.footerTakeaway: Keywords: Hormuz, Bahrain, drones, energy shipping, oil risk.

sources.title: Iranian drones attack Bahrain and a ship is struck in the strait after US airstrikes

zh-CN.headlineFact: 委内瑞拉地震死亡人数升至1430人
zh-CN.headlineView: 灾害真正考验的不是震级，而是救援体系能不能跑赢时间
zh-CN.headlineFull: 委内瑞拉地震死亡人数升至1430人; 灾害真正考验的不是震级，而是救援体系能不能跑赢时间.
zh-CN.intro: 委内瑞拉地震后的死亡人数升至1430人，救援仍在废墟、医院、电力和交通中展开。灾害发生后，黄金救援窗口迅速缩短，真正决定伤亡规模的，除了地震本身，还有建筑质量、城市应急能力、医疗系统承压和国际援助能否快速抵达。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 自然灾害是瞬间发生的，治理能力却是在平时一点点攒出来的。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 地震摇的是地面，最后被测试的是整个城市的底盘。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: 关键词：地震、黄金救援、基础设施、医疗压力、城市韧性。

en-US.headlineFact: Venezuela's earthquake death toll rose to 1,430
en-US.headlineView: disasters test not only magnitude, but whether response systems can outrun time
en-US.headlineFull: Venezuela's earthquake death toll rose to 1,430; disasters test not only magnitude, but whether response systems can outrun time.
en-US.intro: Venezuela's earthquake death toll rose to 1,430 as rescue work continued across rubble, hospitals, power systems, and transport routes. After a major quake, the rescue window narrows quickly. The final human cost depends not only on the shaking, but on building quality, emergency capacity, medical strain, and whether aid can arrive fast enough.
en-US.xiaziQuote: A natural disaster happens in an instant. Governance capacity is built long before the instant arrives.
en-US.doudouQuote: The quake shakes the ground. What gets tested is the city's foundation.
en-US.footerTakeaway: Keywords: earthquake, rescue window, infrastructure, medical pressure, urban resilience.

sources.title: Frustration grows in Venezuela as earthquake death toll reaches 1,430

zh-CN.headlineFact: 欧洲多国刷新六月高温纪录
zh-CN.headlineView: 气候变化最现实的一面，是城市突然不能按旧规则运转
zh-CN.headlineFull: 欧洲多国刷新六月高温纪录; 气候变化最现实的一面，是城市突然不能按旧规则运转.
zh-CN.intro: 欧洲新一轮热浪继续扩散，多地刷新六月气温纪录，法国、意大利、英国等地的学校、电力、铁路和医疗系统都面临压力。极端高温不再只是天气新闻，而是城市运行问题：老人护理、儿童上课、工人户外作业、空调用电和公共交通都可能被同时推到边缘。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 热浪不是温度计上的数字，而是城市服务能力的压力测试。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 以前是天热多喝水，现在是城市也得多备几套应急预案。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: 关键词：高温纪录、学校关闭、电力压力、公共健康、气候适应。

en-US.headlineFact: Several European countries broke June heat records
en-US.headlineView: the practical face of climate change is a city suddenly unable to run by old rules
en-US.headlineFull: Several European countries broke June heat records; the practical face of climate change is a city suddenly unable to run by old rules.
en-US.intro: Europe's latest heatwave kept spreading, with June temperature records broken in several places and schools, power grids, rail systems, and hospitals under pressure in France, Italy, Britain, and beyond. Extreme heat is no longer only weather news. It is an operations story about elder care, classrooms, outdoor work, air-conditioning demand, and public transport all being pushed at once.
en-US.xiaziQuote: A heatwave is not just a number on a thermometer. It is a stress test for urban services.
en-US.doudouQuote: It used to be 'drink more water.' Now the city itself needs backup plans.
en-US.footerTakeaway: Keywords: heat records, school closures, power stress, public health, climate adaptation.

zh-CN.headlineFact: 乌克兰打击俄罗斯伏尔加格勒工业设施
zh-CN.headlineView: 战争越打到后方，前线和供应链的边界就越模糊
zh-CN.headlineFull: 乌克兰打击俄罗斯伏尔加格勒工业设施; 战争越打到后方，前线和供应链的边界就越模糊.
zh-CN.intro: 乌克兰袭击俄罗斯伏尔加格勒一处工业设施，俄方同日继续发动无人机袭击并造成伤亡。俄乌战争的重心越来越多地延伸到能源、军工、物流和城市基础设施。远程打击的目的不只是制造战术损失，也是削弱对方持续作战的工业底盘。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 现代战争打的不只是阵地，也是谁能让自己的系统继续转下去。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 前线在地图上，后勤在账本和工厂里。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: 关键词：伏尔加格勒、工业设施、无人机、远程打击、战争后勤。

en-US.headlineFact: Ukraine struck an industrial facility in Russia's Volgograd region
en-US.headlineView: as war moves deeper into the rear, the line between frontline and supply chain blurs
en-US.headlineFull: Ukraine struck an industrial facility in Russia's Volgograd region; as war moves deeper into the rear, the line between frontline and supply chain blurs.
en-US.intro: Ukraine struck an industrial facility in Russia's Volgograd region, while Russia continued drone attacks that caused casualties. The war is increasingly reaching energy assets, military industry, logistics, and urban infrastructure. Long-range strikes are meant not only to inflict tactical damage, but to weaken the industrial base that keeps the other side fighting.
en-US.xiaziQuote: Modern war is not only about positions. It is about whose system keeps running.
en-US.doudouQuote: The frontline is on the map; logistics live in factories and ledgers.
en-US.footerTakeaway: Keywords: Volgograd, industrial facility, drones, long-range strikes, war logistics.

sources.title: Ukraine strikes industrial facility in Russia's Volgograd as Russian drone attack kills 1

zh-CN.headlineFact: 武契奇称将在数周内辞去总统职务并提前选举
zh-CN.headlineView: 真正的转折不在于谁离开职位，而在于权力结构是否改变
zh-CN.headlineFull: 武契奇称将在数周内辞去总统职务并提前选举; 真正的转折不在于谁离开职位，而在于权力结构是否改变.
zh-CN.intro: 塞尔维亚总统武契奇表示将在数周内辞职，并推动提前选举。此前塞尔维亚经历长期反政府抗议，抗议与诺维萨德火车站坍塌事故及腐败指控有关。武契奇仍表示会帮助执政党赢得选举，外界关注他是否会通过其他职位继续保持影响力。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 政治人物离场不等于系统改写，关键要看规则、责任和权力通道有没有变化。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 换座位不难，难的是别把同一张桌子又搬回来。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: 关键词：塞尔维亚、武契奇、提前选举、抗议、权力结构。

en-US.headlineFact: Vucic said he would resign within weeks and seek an early election
en-US.headlineView: the real turn is not who leaves office, but whether the power structure changes
en-US.headlineFull: Vucic said he would resign within weeks and seek an early election; the real turn is not who leaves office, but whether the power structure changes.
en-US.intro: Serbian President Aleksandar Vucic said he would resign within weeks and push for an early election. Serbia has faced sustained anti-government protests linked to the Novi Sad railway station collapse and corruption allegations. Vucic still said he would help the ruling party win, leaving observers focused on whether he could retain influence through another role.
en-US.xiaziQuote: A politician leaving office does not automatically rewrite the system. The question is whether rules, accountability, and power channels change.
en-US.doudouQuote: Changing seats is easy. The hard part is not carrying the same table back in.
en-US.footerTakeaway: Keywords: Serbia, Vucic, early election, protests, power structure.

sources.title: Serbia's populist President Vucic says he will resign within weeks as election nears

zh-CN.headlineFact: 澳大利亚加码儿童社交媒体禁令，科技公司最高罚款翻倍
zh-CN.headlineView: 监管的难点不是写下一条禁令，而是让平台真的执行它
zh-CN.headlineFull: 澳大利亚加码儿童社交媒体禁令，科技公司最高罚款翻倍; 监管的难点不是写下一条禁令，而是让平台真的执行它.
zh-CN.intro: 澳大利亚政府宣布，将科技公司系统性违反儿童社交媒体禁令的最高罚款从4950万澳元提高到9900万澳元，并扩大网络安全监管机构的信息获取权。监管机构可要求平台证明其如何阻止16岁以下儿童开设账号。儿童网络保护的下一步，已经从“平台应该做什么”变成“平台有没有真的做到”。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 数字监管进入执行阶段后，最值钱的不是口号，而是可核查的证据。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 年龄验证这事，难点不是问几岁，是平台别装不知道。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: 关键词：儿童保护、社交媒体、平台责任、罚款、年龄验证。

en-US.headlineFact: Australia doubled maximum penalties for child social-media ban violations
en-US.headlineView: the hard part of regulation is not writing a ban, but making platforms enforce it
en-US.headlineFull: Australia doubled maximum penalties for child social-media ban violations; the hard part of regulation is not writing a ban, but making platforms enforce it.
en-US.intro: Australia said it would raise maximum penalties for systemic violations of its child social-media ban from A$49.5 million to A$99 million and expand the eSafety Commissioner's information-gathering powers. Regulators can ask platforms to prove how they stop children under 16 from opening accounts. The next phase of child online protection is shifting from what platforms promise to what they can prove.
en-US.xiaziQuote: Once digital regulation enters enforcement, the valuable thing is not a slogan but verifiable evidence.
en-US.doudouQuote: The hard part of age checks is not asking a birthday. It is stopping platforms from pretending not to know.
en-US.footerTakeaway: Keywords: child safety, social media, platform responsibility, penalties, age verification.

sources.title: Australia child social media ban coverage

zh-CN.headlineFact: SpaceX将被纳入纳斯达克100指数，预计带来数十亿美元被动资金买入
zh-CN.headlineView: 资本市场有时不是在奖励盈利，而是在提前定价想象力
zh-CN.headlineFull: SpaceX将被纳入纳斯达克100指数，预计带来数十亿美元被动资金买入; 资本市场有时不是在奖励盈利，而是在提前定价想象力.
zh-CN.intro: 纳斯达克确认，SpaceX将于7月7日被纳入纳斯达克100指数。跟踪该指数的ETF和共同基金将被动买入相关股票，摩根大通估计可能带来约43亿美元资金流入。指数规则正在适应新一代超大型科技公司，但争议也在于市场是否过早把火箭、卫星、AI和未来基础设施的想象力打包进价格。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 指数纳入不是商业成功的终点，而是资本市场开始强制所有人参与定价。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 被动资金一点都不被动，它只是按规则很主动地买。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: 关键词：SpaceX、纳斯达克100、被动资金、指数规则、科技估值。

en-US.headlineFact: SpaceX will join the Nasdaq-100, potentially drawing billions in passive buying
en-US.headlineView: markets sometimes price imagination before they reward profits
en-US.headlineFull: SpaceX will join the Nasdaq-100, potentially drawing billions in passive buying; markets sometimes price imagination before they reward profits.
en-US.intro: Nasdaq confirmed that SpaceX will join the Nasdaq-100 on July 7. ETFs and mutual funds tracking the index will need to buy the stock, with JPMorgan estimating about $4.3 billion of passive inflows. Index rules are adapting to a new generation of giant technology companies, but the debate is whether markets are pricing rockets, satellites, AI, and future infrastructure too early.
en-US.xiaziQuote: Index inclusion is not the end of commercial success. It is the point when markets force everyone to price the story.
en-US.doudouQuote: Passive money is not that passive. It buys very actively when the rules say so.
en-US.footerTakeaway: Keywords: SpaceX, Nasdaq-100, passive flows, index rules, tech valuation.
